chunks.title: Wisdom's Invitation
chunks.reason: Describes Wisdom preparing her house and calling the simple to eat and drink.

chunks.title: Wisdom's Benefits
chunks.reason: Discusses the outcomes of disciplining scoffers versus wise men and the value of wisdom.

chunks.title: Foolishness's Invitation
chunks.reason: Describes the woman of foolishness calling passersby and the hidden consequence of death.
